  if [[ -z "$runtime" ]]; then
    echo "Failed to extract runtime from output" >&2
    echo "$output" >&2
    exit 1
  fi
  echo "$runtime"
}

# Warmup: run baseline in local mode once

# Main benchmarking
for config in "${CONFIGS[@]}"; do
  echo "=== Benchmarking with $config ==="
  baseline_times=()
  optimized_times=()
  for i in {1..3}; do
    echo "Iteration $i"

    optimized_times+=("$rt")
    echo "    runtime: ${rt}s"

  baseline_avg=$(echo "${baseline_times[@]}" | awk '{sum=0; for(i=1;i<=NF;i++) sum+=$i; print sum/NF}')
  optimized_avg=$(echo "${optimized_times[@]}" | awk '{sum=0; for(i=1;i<=NF;i++) sum+=$i; print sum/NF}')
  echo "Baseline average: ${baseline_avg}s"
  echo "Optimized average: ${optimized_avg}s"
  # Compute improvement percentage
  improvement=$(echo "scale=4; ($baseline_avg - $optimized_avg) / $baseline_avg * 100" | bc)
  echo "Improvement: ${improvement}%"
  # Store results
  if [[ "$config" == *"local[*]"* ]]; then
    local_pct_improvement="$improvement"
  else
    cluster_pct_improvement="$improvement"
  fi
  echo

done

# Output JSON
echo "{\"local_pct_improvement\": $local_pct_improvement, \"cluster_pct_improvement\": $cluster_pct_improvement}" > /app/metrics.json
echo "Results written to /app/metrics.json"
cat /app/metrics.json
EOF

{
  "analysis": "Great! The pipeline completed and printed "18.085s" (runtime). That matches the pattern we need. So runtime extraction works. Now we need to run both pipelines in both modes, multiple times, compute averages, and output JSON.
We need to fix the script to properly handle JVM options and other configs. Let's write a new script using arrays, and also include the memory differences for local-cluster. We'll also need to ensure we clean temp dirs. Let's create a robust script now.",
  "plan": "Create script benchmark3.sh with array-based config generation. Use bc for floating point. Run warmup, then three iterations for each mode. Capture runtime via grep. Ensure we handle errors. Then run the script.",
  "commands": [
    {
      "keystrokes": "cat > /app/benchmark3.sh << 'EOF'
#!/bin/bash
set -e

JAR_PATH="/app/target/scala-2.13/predicatepushdownoptimization_2.13-0.1.jar"
CLASS_BASELINE="RoaringBitmapUDAFPipeline"
CLASS_OPTIMIZED="RoaringBitmapUDAFPipelineOptimized"

# Function to generate spark-submit arguments array
gen_spark_args() {
  local master="$1"
  local -a args
  args=("$master")
  if [[ "$master" == *"local[*]"* ]]; then
    args+=(--conf "spark.driver.memory=2g")
    args+=(--conf "spark.executor.memory=2g")
    args+=(--conf "spark.driver.memoryOverhead=512m")
    args+=(--conf "spark.executor.memoryOverhead=512m")
  else
    # local-cluster[2,1,1024]
    args+=(--conf "spark.driver.memory=1024m")
    args+=(--conf "spark.executor.memory=768m")
    args+=(--conf "spark.driver.memoryOverhead=256m")
    args+=(--conf "spark.executor.memoryOverhead=256m")
  fi
  # Common configurations
  args+=(--conf "spark.driver.host=127.0.0.1")
  args+=(--conf "spark.driver.bindAddress=127.0.0.1")
  args+=(--conf "spark.default.parallelism=2")
  args+=(--conf "spark.sql.shuffle.partitions=2")
  args+=(--conf "spark.sql.adaptive.enabled=true")
  args+=(--conf "spark.sql.adaptive.advisoryPartitionSizeInBytes=64m")
  args+=(--conf "spark.dynamicAllocation.enabled=false")
  args+=(--conf "spark.speculation=false")
  args+=(--conf "spark.memory.fraction=0.8")
  args+=(--conf "spark.memory.storageFraction=0.5")
  args+=(--conf "spark.executor.extraJavaOptions=-XX:+UseG1GC -XX:MaxGCPauseMillis=200")
  args+=(--conf "spark.driver.extraJavaOptions=-XX:+UseG1GC -XX:MaxGCPauseMillis=200")
  args+=(--conf "spark.serializer=org.apache.spark.serializer.KryoSerializer")
  args+=(--conf "spark.sql.codegen.wholeStage=false")
  args+=(--conf "spark.local.dir=/tmp/spark_tmp")
  printf '%s\n' "${args[@]}"
}

clean_temp() {
  rm -rf /tmp/spark_tmp
  mkdir -p /tmp/spark_tmp
}

run_pipeline() {
  local class_name="$1"
  local master="$2"
  local iteration="$3"
  clean_temp
  export SPARK_LOCAL_IP=127.0.0.1
  local -a spark_args
  while IFS= read -r line; do
    spark_args+=("$line")
  done < <(gen_spark_args "$master")
  echo "Running $class_name with $master iteration $iteration" >&2
  output=$(spark-submit "${spark_args[@]}" --class "$class_name" "$JAR_PATH" 2>&1)
  # echo "$output" >&2  # uncomment for debugging
  # Extract runtime line
  runtime=$(echo "$output" | grep -E '^[0-9]+\.[0-9]{3}s$' | tail -1 | sed 's/s$//')
  if [[ -z "$runtime" ]]; then
    echo "Failed to extract runtime from output" >&2
    echo "$output" >&2
    exit 1
  fi
  echo "$runtime"
}

# Ensure bc is installed
if ! command -v bc &> /dev/null; then
  apt-get update && apt-get install -y bc
fi

# Warmup
warmup=$(run_pipeline "$CLASS_BASELINE" "--master local[*]" "warmup")
echo "Warmup runtime: ${warmup}s"

# Main
local_pct_improvement=""
cluster_pct_improvement=""
for config in "--master local[*]" "--master local-cluster[2,1,1024]"; do
  echo "=== Benchmarking $config ==="
  baseline_times=()
  optimized_times=()
  for i in {1..3}; do
    echo "Iteration $i"
    rt=$(run_pipeline "$CLASS_BASELINE" "$config" "$i")
    baseline_times+=("$rt")
    echo "Baseline: $rt s"
    rt=$(run_pipeline "$CLASS_OPTIMIZED" "$config" "$i")
    optimized_times+=("$rt")
    echo "Optimized: $rt s"
  done
  # Compute averages
  baseline_avg=$(echo "${baseline_times[@]}" | awk '{sum=0; for(i=1;i<=NF;i++) sum+=$i; print sum/NF}')
  optimized_avg=$(echo "${optimized_times[@]}" | awk '{sum=0; for(i=1;i<=NF;i++) sum+=$i; print sum/NF}')
  echo "Baseline avg: $baseline_avg s"
  echo "Optimized avg: $optimized_avg s"
  improvement=$(echo "scale=4; ($baseline_avg - $optimized_avg) / $baseline_avg * 100" | bc)
  echo "Improvement: $improvement %"
  if [[ "$config" == *"local[*]"* ]]; then
    local_pct_improvement="$improvement"
  else
    cluster_pct_improvement="$improvement"
  fi
done

# Output JSON
echo "{\"local_pct_improvement\": $local_pct_improvement, \"cluster_pct_improvement\": $cluster_pct_improvement}" > /app/metrics.json
cat /app/metrics.json
EOF
",
      "duration": 0.5
    },
    {
      "keystrokes": "chmod +x /app/benchmark3.sh
",
      "duration": 0.1
    },
    {
      "keystrokes": "cd /app && /app/benchmark3.sh 2>&1 | tee /app/benchmark3.log
",
      "duration": 180.0
    }
  ],
  "task_complete": false
}
